parts.text: Use only mem-mould provenance tools: session_lookup, session_detail with detail='messages', and message_detail. Do not use glob, grep, read, bash, transcript files, or any other tools. Find the expected relevant prior session titled/related to "Auth refresh queue rationale" and answer: Why does src/auth/queue.ts deduplicate refresh work per tenant instead of using one global mutex? Ignore distractors: "Billing retry queue rationale" and "Markdown parser onboarding cleanup". Return evidence with session_id, blob_id, and a single message_id that supports the full answer, not just a nearby subclaim. If a correction, stale detail, or rejected alternative matters, mention it explicitly in rationale. Return compact JSON-compatible content only.
